JavaScript parsing and bytecode generation components for the JerryScript engine, including lexer, parser, memory management, and utility functions.


## Files
- **[byte-code.c](byte-code.c.md)**: Defines and manages flags and names for JavaScript bytecode opcodes and extended opcodes.
- **[byte-code.h](byte-code.h.md)**: Defines compact byte code (CBC) structures and macros for low memory environments in JavaScript parsing.
- **[common.c](common.c.md)**: Utility functions for managing and debugging JavaScript literals in a parser.
- **[common.h](common.h.md)**: Defines data structures and macros for JavaScript parsing, including literal types and TRY/CATCH blocks.
- **[js-lexer.c](js-lexer.c.md)**: Implements a JavaScript lexer for parsing tokens, identifiers, strings, numbers, and regular expressions.
- **[js-lexer.h](js-lexer.h.md)**: Defines lexer token types, structures, and macros for parsing JavaScript in the JerryScript engine.
- **[js-parser-expr.c](js-parser-expr.c.md)**: Implements a JavaScript expression parser that generates bytecode for unary, binary, and literal expressions.
- **[js-parser-internal.h](js-parser-internal.h.md)**: Header file for internal JavaScript parser structures, flags, memory management, and utility functions.
- **[js-parser-limits.h](js-parser-limits.h.md)**: Defines limits for JavaScript parser components like identifier length, string length, and code size.
- **[js-parser-mem.c](js-parser-mem.c.md)**: Memory management functions for a JavaScript parser, including allocation, deallocation, and stack operations.
- **[js-parser-scanner.c](js-parser-scanner.c.md)**: Implements a JavaScript parser scanner for tokenizing and analyzing JavaScript code structures.
- **[js-parser-statm.c](js-parser-statm.c.md)**: Implements parsing logic for JavaScript statements, including handling of loops, conditionals, and error management.
- **[js-parser-util.c](js-parser-util.c.md)**: Utility functions for emitting and managing bytecode in a JavaScript parser, including error handling.
- **[js-parser.c](js-parser.c.md)**: Implements JavaScript parsing and bytecode generation for the JerryScript engine, including error handling and function parsing.
- **[js-parser.h](js-parser.h.md)**: Defines error codes, structures, and functions for parsing JavaScript scripts in the JerryScript engine.
